slides.body: This is not exceptional. This is the market rate. ↓
Here's what sync placements actually pay:

📱 Global ad campaign
$10,000 – $75,000+ 🎮 AAA video game
$5,000 – $20,000+ These are upfront licensing fees.
Not royalties. Not splits. Not "exposure." You also earn performance royalties every time the content airs. Streaming: fractions of a cent per play.
Sync: thousands, once, yours. The market exists. The demand is real.
What's missing is the infrastructure connecting African composers to it. Save this. Then ask yourself: is your music in the room? #SyncLicensing #AfricanComposers #MusicBusiness #SyncMaster #StreamingVsSync
